case_title: NOVA CASUALTY COMPANY VS. SUZANNE BARBARA MENDOZA et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-29-2014 CONTINUED TO JAN-28-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). ***NOTE: DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED AUG-26-2014.*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
